title: Kubernetes Deployment Configuration
input_format: Application configuration with image, replicas, resources, ports, health checks, and environment variables
output_format: Complete Kubernetes manifests: Deployment, Service, HPA, and Ingress YAML
example_input: { name: 'api', image: 'api:v1.0', replicas: 3, port: 3000, resources: { cpu: '500m', memory: '512Mi' } }
example_output: Kubernetes Deployment, Service (ClusterIP), HPA, and Ingress manifests as YAML
constraints:
- Deployment must include resource requests and limits
- Must have liveness and readiness probes
- Must use rolling update strategy
- Service must expose correct port
- HPA must scale based on CPU
function_signature: function generateK8sManifests(config: { name: string; image: string; replicas: number; port: number; resources: { cpu: string; memory: string } }): string {}
